title: headtohead result row
description: One per-run JSONL row emitted by evals/headtohead/run.sh — one row per (task, arm, seed) session. Cost/metric fields are nullable-but-present: a crashed or capped run still records the row, with whatever partial cost it accrued, never a dropped field.

arm.description: U = bare CLI + ultracode opt-in; S = plugin installed, no ultracode.

seed.description: 1-indexed run number within this (task, arm) pair.

pass.description: Hidden assert.sh result. Always present, even on a crashed/capped run (false).

usd.description: Total cost across the root session and every spawned workflow/subagent session. Null only when cost tracking never started.

tokens.description: Total tokens across the root session and every spawned workflow/subagent session.

turns.description: Root-session turn count at session end (or at crash/cap).

wall_s.description: Wall-clock seconds from session launch to end (or crash/cap).

diff_lines.description: Added+deleted line count of the produced diff, null if the session never produced one.

judge_score.description: Blinded rubric-judge maintainability score, null until judging runs.
